mapper.select: SELECT vehicle_id, user_id, household_id, license_plate, car_model, status, approved_by, approved_at, created_at FROM vehicle WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT vehicle_id, user_id, household_id, license_plate, car_model, status, approved_by, approved_at, created_at FROM vehicle WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}
SELECT vehicle_id, user_id, household_id, license_plate, car_model, status, approved_by, approved_at, created_at FROM vehicle ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicle WHERE household_id = #{householdId} AND status != 'REJECTED'
SELECT vehicle_id FROM vehicle WHERE license_plate = #{licensePlate} AND status = 'APPROVED' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vehicle (user_id, household_id, license_plate, car_model, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{householdId}, #{licensePlate}, #{carModel}, 'PENDING', NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE vehicle SET status = 'APPROVED', approved_by = #{approvedBy}, approved_at = NOW() WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}
